name: Carrot Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 medium Carrots, washed, lightly peeled and grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the reduced-calorie mayonnaise and plain low-fat yogurt in a bowl.
2. Thin the dressing with about 2 tablespoons of orange juice, stirring until combined.
3. Grate the carrots.
4. Add the grated carrots to the dressing and mix well.
5. Stir in your choice of remaining ingredients.
